suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider documenting a best practice for accessing dropdown/list items in tests: prefer querying by testid, role, or label text rather than index-based access (items[0], items[1]) which is fragile if item order changes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: integration-theme-service review flagged index-based access in themetoggle.integration.test.tsx as fragile test pattern
